Applying to 11111101
Input
0 1
1 1
2 1
3 1
4 1
5 1
6 0
7 1
Output
0 XNOR34 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR45 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR56 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
3 XNOR67OR0 = OR(XNOR(0,1),1) = 1
4 XNOR70OR1 = OR(XNOR(1,1),1) = 1
5 OR-NOT21 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
6 OR-NOT32 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
7 OR-NOT43 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1

\boxed{11011111}
